title: Version History
summary: Track updates and changes to the MedTech Europe Code App.

sections.title: July 2026 Update
sections.legalText:
Current

Knowledge Quiz

  • Added a configurable Knowledge Quiz covering selected Code chapters, with randomized questions, results review, explanations, and shareable quiz links.

TPPT Checker

  • Added the TPPT Checker for importing PDF, Word, or pasted agenda text; reviewing detected sessions and session types; checking practical and hands-on duration thresholds; and exporting an assessment report.
  • Users remain responsible for reviewing the detected sessions and classifications before relying on an assessment.

Content Accuracy

  • Reviewed every PDF-backed Code chapter against the September 2024 source PDF and restored identified omissions, wording, tables, annex details, and the Annex III geographic map while retaining documented corrections to obvious source typographical errors.

Navigation

  • Added readable chapter and decision-tree URLs with browser Back and Forward navigation.
  • Existing Code section, decision-tree, Quiz, and TPPT links remain supported and are upgraded to the current URL format when opened.

Accessibility

  • Improved labels and keyboard access for TPPT agenda controls, session editing, dialogs, and mobile navigation.

sections.title: v1.1.0 — April 2026
sections.legalText:
Multi-Section Architecture

  • Added the Home Hub with navigation to The Code and Decision Trees.
  • Added a section-aware sidebar and breadcrumbs.

Decision Trees

  • Added interactive decision trees, full-tree visualization, contextual help, navigation controls, outcome states, and links from related Code content.

Navigation And Reading

  • Added collapsible Code navigation, section deep links, previous and next chapter controls, and the desktop table of contents.
  • Added filtered Code search, match counts, search highlighting, glossary definitions, citation and link copying, print mode, and reader settings.

Bookmarks And History

  • Added browser-stored bookmarks for Code sections and Recently Viewed tracking for the last five visited Code chapters.

Offline And Keyboard Support

  • Added progressive web app installation, offline asset caching, and keyboard shortcuts for search and print.

sections.title: v1.0.0 — Initial Release
sections.legalText:
Initial Release
  • Initial release of the digital MedTech Europe Code.
  • Full text of the Code of Ethical Business Practice.
  • Initial implementation of accessibility menu.
  • Search functionality.
  • External link/sharing feature.
